title: Voice Plugin
description: The voice plugin provides text-to-speech capabilities.
content:
# Voice Plugin

The voice plugin provides text-to-speech capabilities.

## Providers

- ElevenLabs
- OpenAI TTS
- Custom endpoints

## Configuration

```json
{
  "voice": {
    "enabled": true,
    "provider": "elevenlabs",
    "voiceId": "your-voice-id"
  }
}
```
